message:
fix(mux_client): schedule LabRuntime task before auto-advance (wa-p48pw)

The wa-p48pw LabRuntime tests in vendored::mux_client::tests::
labruntime_mux_client were hanging with StuckBailout because
create_task only parks the task in the scheduler — you still have to
schedule(task_id, 0) before run_with_auto_advance or the runtime never
picks it up and loops forever emitting no-progress ticks.

Matches the pattern used by the working tests/pool_labruntime.rs
harness (common/lab helpers do the same thing inside run_lab_test).

All 8 LabRuntime tests in the module now pass (cargo test
-p frankenterm-core --lib vendored::mux_client::tests::labruntime_mux_client::).

The small clippy-adjusted matches! call on line 8452 is rustfmt follow-up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
